svg.title: Mermaid specialised participants
svg.desc: Demonstrates Mermaid specialised participant declarations mapped onto sequencer actor metadata. From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with: node sequencer.js --mermaid -i test/mermaid-features/20-specialised-participants/input.mmd -o -f -t test/mermaid-features/20-specialised-participants
svg.text: Demonstrates Mermaid specialised participant declarations mapped onto sequencer actor metadata.
From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with:
5. Gather related rows [Mermaid: FlowController->>CollectionsNode: Gather related rows]
